labels.description: Even a perfect program still has bugs
labels.name: bug 🐞

title: Fix index calculation for Lagrangian particles in periodic directions
Support non-trivial horizontal coordinates for single column grids

body:
This PR tweaks the initialization procedure for `run!` so that schedules are initialized separately from the execution of callbacks and output writers at `iteration == 0`. This allows simulations that start from iterations other than `0` to execute correctly.

It also re-defines the meaning of "actuations" for `TimeInterval` to be more sensible. Previously the actual number of actuations was `actuations - 1` which is confusing.

There are still some issues with initialization. However I think this PR helps to clarify the distinction between "initialization", which occurs whenever we call `run!`, vs the thing we do at "iteration 0", like writing output.

Resolves #3657
title: (0.91.5) Tweak initialization procedure so that callback schedules work with checkpointed simulations
